sourceTitle: GeoNames Syrian Arab Republic Gazetteer Extract

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-28-subdistricts/geonames-sy-adm3-records.tsv
rawFiles.notes: Filtered SY.txt rows where feature class is A and feature code is ADM3.

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-28-subdistricts/normalized-subdistrict-records.json
rawFiles.notes: Local normalized subdistrict records after source matching and review cleanup.

transforms: Filtered GeoNames Syria dump to ADM3 administrative records.
Matched GeoNames ADM3 representative points to geoBoundaries ADM3 polygons.
Used GeoNames latitude and longitude as seed representative centroids where a GeoNames ADM3 point matched the current geoBoundaries shape.
Used Arabic names from GeoNames where Wikidata did not provide a suitable Arabic label.
Preserved GeoNames names and alternate names as source-backed aliases when they did not duplicate canonical names.
Skipped GeoNames population values because ADM3 population values in the dump are zero and not suitable as dated population measurements.
reviewNotes: GeoNames supplied 268 Syria ADM3 rows. Spatial matching produced 266 current geoBoundaries ADM3 shapes with selected GeoNames IDs. Jaramana and Babella each contained two GeoNames ADM3 points; the closest current name match was selected and the older Ghouta points were retained only as aliases and review context.
